name: Willis Tower
priceSource: Sold March 2015 to Blackstone for $1.3B — the highest price ever paid for a single U.S. office building outside New York City at the time (CNN, Fortune).

name: General Motors Building
priceSource: Bought by Boston Properties (with Goldman Sachs and Meraas Capital) for $2.8B in June 2008 — one of the largest single-office-tower sales in U.S. history (SEC filings, Property Funds World).

name: Waldorf Astoria New York
priceSource: Sold by Hilton to China's Anbang Insurance Group for $1.95B in October 2014 — the most expensive hotel sale in U.S. history at the time (CNBC, Hilton).

name: Chrysler Building
priceSource: Sold in March 2019 to Austrian developer Signa Holding and RFR Holding for $150M — a steep discount from its $800M sale in 2008 (6sqft, GlobeSt).

name: 8 Canada Square (HSBC Tower)
priceSource: Sold by Korea's National Pension Service to Qatar Investment Authority in December 2014 for over £1.1B — HSBC's former Canary Wharf global HQ (Real Assets, CityAM).
